case_title: MILLER PAUL VS SITE FOR SORE EYES.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SITE FOR SORE EYES.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MILLER PAUL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SITE FOR SORE EYES. $173.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $188.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
